title: quercus dolicholepis
intro: Quercus dolicholepis, also known as the Chinese evergreen oak, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Fagaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus dolicholepis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide protection against certain types of cancer. Quercus dolicholepis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent diseases.
